class.name: ResonanceGeometryAsset
class.brief_description: Stores serialized Steam Audio mesh data for dynamic geometry (export/load workflow).
class.description: Holds data from iplStaticMeshSave. Assign to ResonanceGeometry.mesh_asset when dynamic=true for faster runtime load and better stability. Create via "Nexus Resonance/Export Dynamic Mesh" with a ResonanceGeometry selected.

members.member: Serialized Phonon mesh bytes. Set automatically during export.
Triangle count (set during export, used for notify_geometry_changed).
